views.markdown: If you need help with "咸鱼助手", you can contact junhong, who is the developer. Sadly, we don't know their email.
If you need help with "咸鱼助手", you should contact junhong, who is the package's current maintainer. Sadly, we don't know their email.
If you found a mistake in the depiction or cannot download the package, you can reach out to the maintainer of the "Junhong's Repo" repo, Junhong.
